ModMetaData.name: Emerald Isle
ModMetaData.author: Patrick Mee
ModMetaData.description:
Emerald Isle is a lore-friendly RimWorld expansion inspired by Irish history, archaeology, material culture, language, and mythology.
Early development build. Current content: oats, a medium-cycle grain crop that sits between rice and corn, and the dry-stone wall, a mortarless stone wall that trades durability for cheaper blocks. More of the First Holding is on the way.
